# Psychometrics Item Analysis Tool

An interactive, single-file web tool for teaching and practicing **item analysis** in psychometrics courses.

## What it covers

-   **Difficulty index** — dichotomous and polytomous items
-   **Homogeneity index** — item-test correlation (Pearson)
-   **Corrected item-rest correlation** — when and why to use it
-   **Discrimination** — what it means and how to visualize it
-   **Internal consistency** — relationship between item homogeneity and Cronbach's α
-   **Validity index** — criterion-related validity at item level
-   **Chance correction** — adjusting scores for random guessing

## How to use

No installation required. Open `index.html` in any browser.

**Live demo:** <https://eduar-ramirez.github.io/item-analysis-interactive/>

## Built with

-   Vanilla HTML, CSS and JavaScript
-   [Chart.js](https://www.chartjs.org/) for visualizations

## License

Free to use for educational purposes.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
